title: American Bankers Attempt Last Ditch Effort To Kill Crypto Market Structure Bill Regarding Stablecoins
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

American Bankers Attempt Last Ditch Effort To Kill Crypto Market Structure Bill Regarding Stablecoins

American Bankers Association CEO Rob Nichols urged bank leaders to lobby against a stablecoin yield provision in the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act ahead of Thursday’s Senate markup.

This post American Bankers Attempt Last Ditch Effort To Kill Crypto Market Structure Bill Regarding Stablecoins first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Senate Schedules CLARITY Act Markup as Banking Lobby, Democrats Mount Resistance
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Senate Schedules CLARITY Act Markup as Banking Lobby, Democrats Mount Resistance

After nearly a year of delays, the Senate Banking Committee scheduled a markup of the CLARITY Act for May 14.

This post Senate Schedules CLARITY Act Markup as Banking Lobby, Democrats Mount Resistance first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Strategy (MSTR) Buys $43 Million More Bitcoin After Saylor Defends Potential BTC Sales
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Buys $43 Million More Bitcoin After Saylor Defends Potential BTC Sales

Strategy added 535 more BTC for $43 million days after Michael Saylor said the company may consider selling part of its bitcoin holdings for the first time.

This post Strategy (MSTR) Buys $43 Million More Bitcoin After Saylor Defends Potential BTC Sales first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: What does Bitcoin “Power Projection” mean to the U.S. Military?
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

What does Bitcoin “Power Projection” mean to the U.S. Military? 

“INDOPACOM Commander Admiral Samuel Paparo told Congress the U.S. military is operating a live Bitcoin node and views the protocol as a ‘valuable computer science tool’ for power projection, directly echoing Jason Lowery’s influential thesis.”

This post What does Bitcoin “Power Projection” mean to the U.S. Military?  first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Juan Galt.

title: Why eBay Should Ignore GameStop and Use Bitcoin to Save $1.2 Billion in Transaction Costs
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Why eBay Should Ignore GameStop and Use Bitcoin to Save $1.2 Billion in Transaction Costs

Why eBay should reject GameStop and launch Bitcoin payments: A $1.2B annual opportunity cost that returns massive fee savings directly to global sellers.

This post Why eBay Should Ignore GameStop and Use Bitcoin to Save $1.2 Billion in Transaction Costs first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Nick Ward.
